baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +$1 cash in any negative GMI year.
In any year following a negative GMI year (the prior-year rule applies): treat loan repayment roll as one higher on this asset, consistent with Defence prior-year loan terms.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +2).

flavourText: Armies march on logistics. Empires run on supply chains.
